notes: Archive Sweep inspected active specs/** before Phase 1.
The only active spec directory is the current PRSG-014 target, so no prior spec was eligible for archival or cleanup.

plan.step: Archive Sweep: previously merged specs dry-run/apply eligibility

plan.summary: Created spec.md and requirements checklist. Spec has 4 user stories, 15 functional requirements, 11 acceptance scenarios, 6 success criteria, and 0 NEEDS CLARIFICATION markers.

Accepted five detection-contract decisions: canonical `gh stack` invocation; shared `stack_manager_decision` object; read-only `gh stack view --json` plus synthetic command plan for pre-mutation proof; topology compatibility from SpecKit PRS/marker state; and array-of-argv command plan records.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Detection Contract Focus Consensus
plan.summary: Round 1 routed to codebase/domain analysts; codebase low confidence triggered Round 2 spec-context review. Final 3-perspective consensus accepted read-only `gh stack view --json` plus synthetic command plan as the safe pre-mutation proof rule, with detailed command/version matrix deferred to Plan.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Mutation and Fallback Focus
plan.summary: Accepted five mutation/fallback decisions: first attempted topology-changing command is the no-fallback mutation boundary; fallback is only before mutating `gh stack` attempts; recoverable block state carries selected manager, failed argv/action, per-operation statuses, topology, PR identity, evidence paths, retry policy, and fallback_allowed=false; retries reconcile by deterministic slice/head/base/PR/head SHA/packet identity; unknown side effects become partial_mutation_unknown.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Mutation and Fallback Focus Consensus
plan.summary: Clarify executor returned no unresolved consensus items.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Emission and Restack Focus
plan.summary: Accepted five emission/restack decisions: packet-owned `gh pr create/edit` remains authoritative before `gh stack` topology linking; stack-wide marker/packet preflight happens before the first mutating `gh stack` command; evidence adds top-level `stack_manager_decision` plus per-operation manager/argv/status; supported restack uses `gh stack rebase --upstack` only behind version/capability proof; command execution is argv-only with validated refs/paths and bounded output tails.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Emission and Restack Focus Consensus
plan.summary: Consensus resolved three items: emission codebase/domain both agreed packet-owned PR metadata precedes stack linking; restack codebase/domain both agreed `gh stack rebase --upstack` is only supported behind version proof with explicit fallback otherwise; security all-three agreed argv-only execution with no command-string execution.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Parity and Test Focus
plan.summary: Accepted five proof/parity decisions: Layer 4 fake-CLI fixtures are authoritative behavior proof; stack-manager decisions use a shared versioned schema with explicit schema fields; Layer 7 is orchestration/live-safe proof only; Layer 8 is operator guidance parity without duplicate Codex implementation; the exact gh stack command/version matrix remains Plan-owned.

plan.step: Phase 2: Clarify - Parity and Test Focus Consensus
plan.summary: Codebase and spec-context analysts agreed that PRSG-014 should prove Claude/Codex parity as operator guidance parity backed by shared scripts/contracts, L1 Codex structural parity, and L4/L7 executable proof; transcript-level Claude/Codex parity remains out of scope until a stable Codex replay/transcript harness and schema exist.

Created plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, quickstart.md, and contracts/stack-manager-decision.schema.json. Resolved gh stack v0.0.5 capability matrix from local CLI help and github/gh-stack project docs, selected read-only view --json proof, kept explicit gh fallback authoritative, and recorded PASS constitution/reviewability status.
Integration checklist covered 12 items and resolved 2 schema/prose gaps: gh_stack.supported/reason evidence parity and explicit-gh fallback schema strictness.
No unresolved consensus items.
Error-handling checklist covered 16 items and resolved 4 gaps around recoverable block requirements, side-effect classification, blocked schema constraints, and mutating failure fixtures.
No unresolved consensus items.
Reliability checklist covered 16 items and resolved 2 gaps around deterministic repo-relative evidence paths and blocked-run resume preflight/superseding behavior.
No unresolved consensus items.

Security checklist covered 15 items and resolved 5 gaps around argv constraints, command-shape allowlisting, evidence path traversal controls, fake CLI boundaries, and injection-focused fixtures. G4 passed with 0 [Gap] markers across all checklist domains.
No unresolved consensus items.

Generated 71 test-first tasks across setup, foundation, US1 detection, US2 emission, US3 restack, US4 guidance/parity, and polish; task-mode reviewability block was size-only and converted into a 5-marker PR plan.

Completed Phase 6 Analyze with 4 findings (0C/1H/3M/0L) remediated: packet-validation hard-block wording, Layer 7/8 fixture path drift, stale checklist item state, and reviewability marker-plan visibility. Marker counter clean; G6 passed.
No unresolved Analyze findings; consensus skipped.
Advisory confidence gate returned NO_DATA because the Analyze synthesizer did not emit a confidence block; recorded as a plugin-regression note and continued to Phase 7.
Completed PRSG-014 implementation tasks and verification; implementation commit 03da8f3.
Completed PRSG-014 implementation tasks and verification; implementation commit 03da8f3.

remediations: Clarified PRSG-012 packet-validation failures as hard blocks before any stack-manager or explicit-gh mutation.
Aligned Layer 7/8 fixture paths in plan.md with generated tasks and existing harness layout.
Marked verified checklist items complete with task/source citations.
Added task reviewability size-only block and PRSG-013 marker-plan summary to tasks.md.

reviewability_tasks_gate.size_only_reason: Task-mode reviewability gate blocked only on size metrics: reviewable LOC and total file count. No correctness or safety blocker was reported.

review_order.title_description: Detect stack manager support before mutation
Thread stack manager decisions through emission
Align stack manager guidance and parity fixtures
